name: Harbin Xinguang Optic-Electronics Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Harbin Xinguang Optic-Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and installation of optical and mechanical integrated products. It offers optical equipment for use in the areas of petrochemicals, high-speed rail, power monitoring, and civil products, as well as in infrared thermal imaging intelligent early warning monitoring system and high-speed railway intelligent detection system. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Harbin, China.
